Pali Rajasthan Advises Aid for Animals Amid Heatwave
Pali Rajasthan: Due to very hot weather conditions, the authorities have advised people to help animals and birds to sustain their livelihood. This advisory was highlighted at Rohat Senior Secondary School.
The initiative aims to encourage the community to provide necessary support to local wildlife and domestic animals facing difficulties due to extreme heat. The school and local officials emphasize the importance of collective efforts to protect these creatures during the severe weather.
